tasks.label: Build and Deploy to Cloud Run
Upload Local Snapshot to GitHub Release
args: & { $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; if (-not (Test-Path radio_cache.db)) { throw 'radio_cache.db not found' }; c:/Users/Mich/radiocache/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from radio_cache.refresh import export_db_snapshot; export_db_snapshot('radio_cache.db', 'radio_cache.db.zip')"; if (Test-Path radio.cache) { if (gh release view cache-latest --repo bumface11/radiocache > $null 2>&1) { gh release upload cache-latest radio_cache.db.zip radio.cache --repo bumface11/radiocache --clobber } else { gh release create cache-latest radio_cache.db.zip radio.cache --repo bumface11/radiocache --title 'Latest radio cache snapshot' --notes 'Manual upload from local workspace.' } } else { if (gh release view cache-latest --repo bumface11/radiocache > $null 2>&1) { gh release upload cache-latest radio_cache.db.zip --repo bumface11/radiocache --clobber } else { gh release create cache-latest radio_cache.db.zip --repo bumface11/radiocache --title 'Latest radio cache snapshot' --notes 'Manual upload from local workspace.' } } }
